message:
feat(sync): add WaitForNotification future for resource pool

Adds a cancel-safe future for waiting on pool resource availability:

WaitForNotification<R, F>:
- Waits until a resource becomes available or pool closes
- Registers in waiter queue with unique ID for tracking
- Updates waker on each poll if it changed (executor compatibility)
- Cleans up waiter registration on drop (cancel safety)

Implementation details:
- Checks idle resources and active count on each poll
- Uses will_wake() to avoid unnecessary waker cloning
- Properly handles the case where waiter was dequeued between polls
- Returns Ready immediately if pool is closed

This enables callers to await resource availability without holding
a lock, improving concurrency in high-contention scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
